description_long: This is a three-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a steep gable roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior is clad in grayish-green shingles, giving it a classic, weathered look. The front facade features two small porches with railings, each accessible by a short set of steps, and a symmetrical arrangement of large rectangular windows on each floor. The rear side has fewer windows and a small balcony or fire escape structure. A single brick chimney rises from the roof, adding to the traditional urban residential character. The house appears to be constructed primarily from wood and masonry, with metal railings and glass windows.
description: A three-story, gray-shingled house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and small front porches. Features include a brick chimney and a rear balcony.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large shingled wall with two windows and a small rear balcony.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two porches with railings, a central entry door, and three rows of large windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a plain shingled wall and a small balcony structure.
description_view_3: Rear view with a main entry door, grid-like basement windows, and three rows of large windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Double front porches with railings and steps, central door, no overhang or columns
